refresher.desc: Already have a licence? We help you brush up on practical skills.

usps.title: Why Fahrschule Kendirci?
usps.sub: What our students appreciate about us.

rating.title: Top Rating
rating.desc: 4.9 stars from 154 genuine Google reviews — that speaks for itself.

fast.title: Fast Results
fast.desc: Efficient training without detours — we get you through your test safely and quickly.

personal.title: Personal Support
personal.desc: Individual, solution-oriented and always open to your questions.

price.title: Fair Prices
price.desc: Affordable rates with no hidden costs — transparent from the start.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.desc: Even with limited German skills you'll receive intensive support — including in Turkish.

local.title: Local in Darmstadt
local.desc: We know the test routes and local specifics — your advantage in the exam.

reviews.text: I got my German driving licence here without any problems and in a short time. Our instructor is solution-oriented and takes care of our needs in the best way. Clear recommendation — and despite my very limited German I was helped enormously.
reviews.author: Erdal A.

reviews.text: A very good driving school. I was very satisfied and thanks to them I passed the test. Thank you for everything!
reviews.author: Damla C.

reviews.text: The best and most affordable driving school in Darmstadt. Even though my German was not good, I was helped in Turkish during the exam — so I passed. Clear recommendation.
reviews.author: Burak Y.

cta_section.title: Ready for your licence?
cta_section.sub: Call us now or send a message — we'll get back to you quickly.

about.title: About Us
about.hero_sub: Personal guidance for years in Darmstadt.
about.story: Fahrschule Kendirci stands for personal, solution-oriented driving instruction in Darmstadt. With individual support, fair prices and a genuine passion for driving, we guide our students safely to their licence — regardless of prior experience or language skills.
about.team_desc: With years of experience and true dedication, Mehmet Kendirci personally accompanies his students through their training. His strength: finding a solution for everyone.

contact.title: Contact
contact.hero_sub: We're here for you — by phone, form or just drop by.
contact.name: Name
contact.gdpr: I agree to the processing of my data in accordance with the privacy policy.
contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.

leistungen.title: Services & Prices
leistungen.hero_sub: All licence classes we offer — transparent and fair.
leistungen.prices_note: Prices on request — individual offers available. Just give us a call.
leistungen.cta_sub: We'll advise you free of charge on all licence classes.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.hero_sub: Answers to the most common questions about your driving licence.

questions.q: How long does licence training take?
questions.a: It depends on your prior experience and available time. Typically a few weeks to months. We adapt the pace individually.
Costs vary by licence class and required lessons. Call us for a personal quote — we're fair and transparent.
Yes! We support our students in Turkish as well — for theory, driving lessons and exam preparation.

questions.q: What documents do I need to register?
questions.a: ID or passport, a passport photo, vision test certificate and first-aid course certificate. We'll help with the details.
Yes, we work around your schedule. Just contact us.
